diff: The Prime Spell delivered in [A.1.10.2.3.2.2.3.3.1 - Prime Agent Delivers Signed-Off Prime Spell For Review](b7e93d92-b433-40dd-bf6b-86a49b7ce9c6) must be externally reviewed during week 2, before the Prime Spell payload delivery specified in [A.1.10.2.3.2.2.3.3.6 - Prime Agent Delivers Prime Spell Payload](d5223f2c-264f-47da-9e59-2574bdf9cfc2). The reviewer must be either a member of a Core Spell Team that is not also serving as the Crafter for the Sky Core Spell of the same Executive Vote cycle, or an external reviewer engaged for the purpose.
